title: 【不死金萝卜】主包
description:
Originated from an inside joke by content creator Pianmu.
由于up偏牧的一个梗而诞生。
body:
As a fan of Pianmu, I created this texture pack that transforms the Totem of Undying into the "Undying Golrot". This inside joke originates from his hardcore survival series when he attempted to destroy a totem to celebrate his world's first anniversary. In an ironic twist, he accidentally grabbed a golden carrot instead fell to his death, and spawned a series of hilarious follow-up stories in the community lore.
我是偏牧的粉丝。这个材质包将不死图腾更改为了不死金萝卜。这来源于他玩极限生存时的一个梗。当时他想废一个图腾,来庆祝自己的极限生存存档到了一年。结果不小心拿成了金萝卜，摔死了。所引发的一系列故事。
